issues.title: Add auto complete configuration property support in mcp autoconfig
issues.body:
in `auto-configurations/spring-ai-mcp-client/pom.xml` need to add a reference to 

```
<dependency>
	<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
	<artifactId>spring-boot-configuration-processor</artifactId>
	<optional>true</optional>
</dependency>
```

to get code completion in IDEs for application.properties/yml

issues.title: Manage dependency of elastic search client
issues.body: For Boot 3.3.x dependency management, an older version of elastic search client is defined in boot's dependency management.  Spring AI needs to be upgraded to use version 8.15.5 (or higher) of this library when using 3.3.x . The 3.4.x branch bring is the correct version, but Spring AI should manage it explicitly so that 3.3.x and 3.4.x boot apps will both work.

comments.body: Spring AI 1.0 GA will support boot 3.4.x.  It will not support boot 3.3.x.  Shortly after 1.0 GA, boot 3.5.x will be released and we will support that.  So this issue can be closed.  Will deal will need to explicitly manage the elastic search dependency based on what we need when we run against boot 3.5.x.

issues.title: Change autoconfiguration from one module into multiple
issues.body:
We need to avoid conflicting versions by having one module for autoconfiguration as client libraries use libraries that are known to cause issues (grpc, guava, etc).  To avoid this we should break up the current one module for auto-configuration into finer grained autoconfiguration dependencies.  This work as started for the MCP support under the `auto-configurations` directory.  

The starters that pick up autononfiguration deps will need to be change, but overall there should be no impact to uses who are picking up starter dependencies.  It is an internal refactoring.

comments.body: PR for chat client and models: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/pull/2289
